allowed_read_only_checks: Confirm page title and URL origin after operator handoff
Read visible permit or application labels already shown to the operator without copying values
Record only synthetic observations derived from this fixture
manual_login_mfa_captcha_handoff_notes: Operator completes sign-in, MFA, and CAPTCHA manually outside automation control
Automation pauses before authenticated review surfaces and resumes only after explicit operator handoff
Credential and browser persistence material is excluded from committed evidence
operator_abort_conditions: Any prompt for official application action
Any request to automate CAPTCHA, MFA, account creation, or credential entry
Any unexpected navigation outside read-only DevHub review surfaces
